goal: Define and implement the plugin-facing permission/config synchronization contract for standard mode and high-privilege state.
non_goals: Do not claim true enforcement unless a local gateway actually enforces it.
Do not make high-privilege mode default.
Do not permit silent path-outside writes.
acceptance_criteria: UI displays standard mode as the default permission mode.
UI displays allowed roots and high-privilege state from local config or gateway response.
The contract distinguishes read/list/search from write/delete/move/rename/create operations.
Path-outside mutation operations require a confirmation flow in the contract.
If the local gateway is not implemented yet, UI labels enforcement status honestly.
